scenarios.title: ML Experiment Tracking and MLOps Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Experiment tracking, AutoML/HPO, model registries, artifacts, sweeps, Launch jobs, MLflow projects/models/evaluation, data versioning pipelines, GenAI observability, local serving, and operational MLOps.
scenarios.role: Use `mlflow` for MLflow repository work: experiment tracking, model registry, MLflow Models and flavors, evaluation, GenAI tracing/prompts/datasets/scorers, local serving, deployments, projects, CLI/server/auth.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `mlflow` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: genai observability, models and flavors, serving and projects, and tracking and registry.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `mlflow` when the request names `mlflow`, centers on MLflow repository work: experiment tracking, model registry, MLflow Models and flavors, evaluation, GenAI tracing/prompts/datasets/scorers, local serving, deployments, projects, CLI/server/auth, and troubleshooting MLflow workflows, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in ml experiment tracking and mlops workflows. Then route to genai observability, models and flavors, serving and projects, or tracking and registry when those focused workflows match.
